mapper.insert: INSERT INTO model_management ( model_id, model_name, version, model_path, upload_time, update_description, status, is_default, creator, published_at, last_used_at, usage_count, validation_status, validation_message, mlops_status, evaluation_dataset, precision_score, recall_score, map_score, f1_score, avg_inference_ms, compatibility_note, deployment_strategy, canary_percent, ab_group, rollback_from_model_id ) VALUES ( #{modelId}, #{modelName}, #{version}, #{modelPath}, #{uploadTime}, #{updateDescription}, #{status}, #{isDefault}, #{creator}, #{publishedAt}, #{lastUsedAt}, #{usageCount}, #{validationStatus}, #{validationMessage}, #{mlopsStatus}, #{evaluationDataset}, #{precisionScore}, #{recallScore}, #{mapScore}, #{f1Score}, #{avgInferenceMs}, #{compatibilityNote}, #{deploymentStrategy}, #{canaryPercent}, #{abGroup}, #{rollbackFromModelId} )
mapper.select: SELECT model_id, model_name, version, model_path, upload_time, update_description, status, is_default, creator, published_at, last_used_at, usage_count, validation_status, validation_message, mlops_status, evaluation_dataset, precision_score, recall_score, map_score, f1_score, avg_inference_ms, compatibility_note, deployment_strategy, canary_percent, ab_group, rollback_from_model_id FROM model_management WHERE model_id = #{modelId}

SELECT model_id, model_name, version, model_path, upload_time, update_description, status, is_default, creator, published_at, last_used_at, usage_count, validation_status, validation_message, mlops_status, evaluation_dataset, precision_score, recall_score, map_score, f1_score, avg_inference_ms, compatibility_note, deployment_strategy, canary_percent, ab_group, rollback_from_model_id FROM model_management WHERE model_name = #{modelName} AND version = #{version}

SELECT model_id, model_name, version, model_path, upload_time, update_description, status, is_default, creator, published_at, last_used_at, usage_count, validation_status, validation_message, mlops_status, evaluation_dataset, precision_score, recall_score, map_score, f1_score, avg_inference_ms, compatibility_note, deployment_strategy, canary_percent, ab_group, rollback_from_model_id FROM model_management ORDER BY is_default DESC, upload_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE model_management SET model_name = #{modelName}, version = #{version}, model_path = #{modelPath}, upload_time = #{uploadTime}, update_description = #{updateDescription}, status = #{status}, is_default = #{isDefault}, creator = #{creator}, published_at = #{publishedAt}, last_used_at = #{lastUsedAt}, usage_count = #{usageCount}, validation_status = #{validationStatus}, validation_message = #{validationMessage}, mlops_status = #{mlopsStatus}, evaluation_dataset = #{evaluationDataset}, precision_score = #{precisionScore}, recall_score = #{recallScore}, map_score = #{mapScore}, f1_score = #{f1Score}, avg_inference_ms = #{avgInferenceMs}, compatibility_note = #{compatibilityNote}, deployment_strategy = #{deploymentStrategy}, canary_percent = #{canaryPercent}, ab_group = #{abGroup}, rollback_from_model_id = #{rollbackFromModelId} WHERE model_id = #{modelId}
